En: I hope you do. I hope we are able to continue as friends despite my scales and my need to infiltrate and betray your precious Revolution.
Zh: “我希望你能这样做。尽管我需要渗透并背叛你宝贵的大革命，我还是希望我们能继续维持朋友关系。”

En: I do hope so, she bows. "I hope we can remain collegial despite my affection for regicide and multiculturalism. We didn't *mean* to kill the king, I assure you."\n
Zh: “希望如此，”她鞠了一躬。“尽管我喜爱弑君和多元文化论，还是希望我们可以维持合作关系。我可以向你保证，我们不是*故意*要杀害国王的。”

En: I do hope so, she bows. "I do hope we're able to remain collegial despite it all. Tell me, when you look in the mirror, do you not see a monster staring back at you?"\n
Zh: “希望如此，”她鞠了一躬。“尽管种种这般，还是希望我们可以维持合作关系。告诉我，当你照镜子的时候，难道你没看见有一头野兽也在回望着你吗？”

En: I do hope so, she bows. "I hope we are able to remain collegial despite it. Remember, we were partners, whether you like to admit it or not. There's blood on many hands, I assure you."
Zh: “希望如此，”她鞠了一躬。“尽管如此，还是希望我们可以维持合作关系。记住，不管你承不承认，我们都是伙伴。我可以向你保证，很多人手上都沾满鲜血。”

En: I do hope so, she bows. "I hope we are able to remain collegial despite my monstrousness. The ultras didn't have anything against the king *or* the Commune, you see. It was just business."
Zh: “希望如此，”她鞠了一躬。“尽管我暴行累累，还是希望我们可以维持合作关系。你看，极端主义者并不会反对国王*或者*是公社。这只不过是生意而已。”

En: Beneath her waterproof raincoat and silk shirt is a body imbibed in Numb 12 perfume. You are suddenly and intimately aware of it.
Zh: 在她那防水雨衣和丝绸衬衫下面，是一具吸收了12号香水味的躯体。你突然对它产生了一种熟悉的感觉。

En: Vile Deuill. (Shake your head slowly.)
Zh: “卑鄙的哀悼。”（慢慢摇摇头。）

En: (Nod.) "Devil Woman."
Zh: （点点头。）“魔女。”

En: *And perswades them to addict themselues to his seruice...*
Zh: “*而且劝服他们沉迷于他的服务……*”

En: That dialect is Ubi Sunt?. You recognize the quote from somewhere. A play, written way back in the Franconigerian century...
Zh: 这是一句尤比萨特土话。你在冥冥之中辨认出这句引述。它出自一出戏剧，源于弗兰考格斯世纪……

En: Wanna... fuck?
Zh: “想要……搞破坏？”

En: I'm afraid you'll find that *every* woman is a Devil Woman, detective. There are only *aesthetic* differences between one and the other.
Zh: “恐怕你会发现*每一个*女人都是魔女，警探。彼此之间只存在着*审美*意义上的差距。”

En: Ah, maybe you remember more than you let on... She gives you a coy little smile. "Despite whatever brain damage the alcohol may have inflicted."
Zh: “啊，也许你记得的比你表现出来的要多……”她朝你露出一个腼腆的笑容。“不管酒精可能对你的大脑造成了怎样的伤害。”

En: Ah, you know more than you let on... She gives you a coy little smile. "Philosopher-Detective of Precinct 41."
Zh: “啊，你知道的比你表现出来的要多……”她朝你露出一个腼腆的笑容。“来自41分局的哲学警探。”

En: Would *you* have done something differently?
Zh: “*你*会做出不同的选择吗？”

En: That settles that.
Zh: “那就这么定了。”

En: Nothing's settled. It simply fades away... She closes her eyes. "Like a lover who has lost their faith. Now, shall we return to reality?"
Zh: “没什么是确定的。它只会逐渐消逝……”她闭上双眼。“就像一个背弃誓言的爱人。现在，我们要回到现实上来吗？”

En: ...steal, kill and destroy? She counters, quick as a whip. "That they say we've been doing for over four decades now. Perhaps regrettably, I've had my fill for this century..."
Zh: “……偷窃，谋杀和毁灭？”她极快地岔开了话题。“他们说现在我们已经做了超过40年。也许会有遗憾，不过我已经完成了自己在这个世纪的使命……”

En: Hmh, the lieutenant hums, reading his notes.
Zh: “嗯，”警督一边看着自己的笔记，一边低吟着。

En: In any case, I'm glad we can remain collegial despite my scaly bulk. And my perverse need to infiltrate and betray both Kingdom *and* Revolution.
Zh: “不管怎么说，尽管我劣迹斑斑，很高兴我们可以保持合作关系。还有我一意孤行的需求——渗透和背叛了王国*和*大革命。”

En: With due respect to our overlords, the eternal *caretaker* government that keeps Martinaise a monument to the efficacy of its artillery...
Zh: “出于对我们最高统治者的尊重，这个永恒的*临时代理*政府，将马丁内斯变成大炮效能纪念碑的政府……”

En: I don't care.
Zh: “我不在乎。”

En: A fitting punishment, she smirks. "To be forgotten, if not forgiven. Save a prayer for us in our *châteaus* on Ozonne and in Stella Maris."
Zh: “一个恰当的惩罚，”她假笑了一下。“不被原谅，那还不如遗忘。在欧佐纳尔和斯特拉里斯的*宫殿*为我们祈祷吧。”

En: You *feel* that she won't like the answer -- just as it's leaving your lips. Even more -- it will hurt her.
Zh: 你*感觉*到她不会喜欢这个答案——当它从你嘴里脱口而出的时候。更有甚者——这会伤害到她。

En: I would not have relinquished sovereignty to the Coalition. Not here in Martinaise -- and not in the Stella Maris or Delta beachheads either. If not for my own sake...
Zh: “我不会把主权让渡给联盟。在马丁内斯不会——在斯特拉里斯或者德尔塔的滩头堡也不会。这不是为了我自己……”

En: An appropriate warning to those who'd cross the line and pull the city into madness once more...
Zh: 对于那些越线和再次让城市陷入疯狂的人，这是一个合适的警告……

En: While a gentle wind sweeps the streets in the rebuilt East, light drizzle washing it clean, lights go up and motor carriages circulate the tracts...
Zh: 一阵轻风扫过重建的东部街道，细雨将它冲洗干净，灯光点亮，汽車在高速公路上来回穿梭……

En: ... then for my daughters'. We had an obligation to defend our sovereignty. We should have *burned* the whole isola down rather than let them have it.
Zh: “……而是为了我的女儿。我们有义务捍卫我们的主权。我们宁愿*烧毁*整个洲，也不愿让它落入他们手中。”

En: She realizes her small, cold fists are clenched. She loosens them.
Zh: 她意识到自己攥紧了那只小巧而冰冷的拳头，随之松开了。

En: You have daughters? (Conclude.)
Zh: “你有女儿？”（推断。）

En: Yes, whatever else I am, I'm also a mother. And a wife. She closes her eyes, then opens them again. "Now -- shall we return to reality?"
Zh: “是的，不管我还有别的什么身份，我还是一位母亲，和一位妻子。”她闭上眼睛，然后再度睁开。“现在——我们可以回到现实的话题了吗？”

En: You're a patriot?
Zh: “你是一个爱国者？”

En: Yes, I suppose I am. But I wouldn't be a patriot anywhere but here.
Zh: “是的，我想是的。但是除了这里，我不会在别的地方成为一个爱国者。”

En: Seditious talk, ma'am. The lieutenant puts down his notes and gives her a look.
Zh: “这是煽动性的言论，夫人，”金放下笔记，看了她一眼。

En: What world? The fading pearls of her eyes look to the sea. "The only one, I suppose -- the world of matter and its pale antipode..."
Zh: “什么世界？”她那双逐渐黯淡的眼睛望向大海。“我猜你是指唯一的这个吧——物质的世界和与之对抗的灰域……”

En: There is a term of endearment they coined for it. In the Dolorian century, when humanity was *high* on this world, discovering more and more of it -- these archipelagos included...
Zh: “他们为此发明了一个爱称。在人性在这个世界正处*高峰*的德洛莉丝世代，人们发现了世界越来越多的部分——包括这些列岛……”

En: You have mis-imagined it. I don't have the power to convey to you the effect and geometry of the images that depict our world from below low orbit. It's...
Zh: “你的想象可能有错。我没有能力向你传达图像的效果和几何结构，从低轨道描绘我们的世界。它是……”

En: What is it?
Zh: “那个爱称是什么？”

En: Well, if you say it's disco...
Zh: “呃，如果你说是迪斯科的话……”

En: Elysium.
Zh: “极乐世界。”

En: We used to think it was a sphere, but that is beginning to look less and less likely by the day. You wouldn't know it from the tabloids, but the ORG nations have been launching weather balloons into the lower ionosphere since the Thirties.
Zh: “我们曾经以为它是一个球体，不过随着日子一天天过去，这种可能性似乎显得越来越小了。从小报上不会了解到的，不过ORG国家自从30年代起，一直在向低电离层发射气象气球……”

En: Elysium... The world needs a term of endearment.
Zh: “极乐世界……这个世界需要一个爱称。”

En: It certainly doesn't feel like I'm fine.
Zh: “我感觉并不太好。”

En: Wait, is this the one with the evil apes?
Zh: “等等，那是上面有邪恶猩猩的那个吗？”

En: I don't feel like I have got the whole picture yet.
Zh: “我觉得我还没有了解全面情况。”

En: It does. There are those who would call it *Hell*...
Zh: “是的。有些人会称之为*地狱*……”

En: There are those who would call it *Hell*...
Zh: “有些人会称之为*地狱*……”

En: Not in this case, no. That sounds more like something the Mesque petrofascists might say... Her gaze wanders.
Zh: “在这种情况下不是的。听起来更像梅斯克的秘密法西斯分子会说的话……”她的目光游移着。

En: This world does not deserve a term of endearment.
Zh: “这个世界不配得到爱称。”

En: Her eyes return to you. "It isn't enough to call us animals. Even animals aren't animals."
Zh: 她的目光回到了你身上。“把我们称之为动物还不够。甚至就连动物都不是动物。”

En: Thanks. Okay.
Zh: “谢谢。好吧。”

En: What are animals then?
Zh: “那是什么动物？”

En: She thinks. "But yes, you'll be fine, don't worry."
Zh: 她想了想。“不过，你会没事的，别担心。”

En: How about -- it's a ball.
Zh: “这个怎么样——它是个球。”

En: They're like you and I, I suppose. Living organisms don't identify with abstractions. Elysium is for particular beings.
Zh: “我猜他们就像你我一样。生物体不认同抽象概念。极乐世界是为特别的生物而存在的。”

En: I don't know about things of that scale, my expertise lies in nations and trade routes, one or several layers below *everything*.
Zh: “我不了解那种规模的事情，我的专业是国家和贸易路线，在*一切*的一层或者好几层之下。”

En: But -- this is one of the great questions of our time. Maybe when they get the complete set together it will jolt us out of our rut -- bring us together. However naive it may sound.
Zh: “不过——这是我们这个时代面临的一个最大的问题。也许当他们把全部拼凑在一起的时候，它会冲击我们的惯例和常规——让我们联合在一起。不管这听起来到底有多天真。”

En: A term of hatred that originates, like many such things, with the Mesque petrofascists.
Zh: “一种表达怨恨的术语，就像很多类似的东西，都起源于梅斯克的秘密法西斯分子。”

En: I am sorry, dear, she looks around. "It must sound quite terrifying through the acute encephalopathy. Even scientific positivism isn't entirely convinced about what we're dealing with here..."
Zh: “很抱歉，亲爱的，”她看了看周围。“急性脑病听起来的确很吓人。就连科学实证主义都不能完全确信我们面对的东西……”

En: See? Everyone finds something worth holding onto in this world -- however wasted its opportunities.
Zh: “看见没？在这个世界上，每个人都能找到某种值得紧紧把握的东西——不管到底浪费了多少机遇。”

En: A dark grey corona?
Zh: “一个深灰色的星冕？”

En: They say there is a rarefied envelope of matter surrounding the darkened disc of our planet. That is, if we are still living on a planet. Or, to speak more plainly, imagine vast swathes of land disrupted by nothingness.
Zh: “他们说我们星球的黑暗圆环周围包裹着一层稀薄的物质。也就是说，如果我们依然生活在一颗星球上面的话。或者，说得更明白一些，想象一片被虚无分裂的广袤大地。”

En: Doesn't sound like any kind of disco I'd like to go to.
Zh: “听起来不像是我想去的那种迪斯科。”

En: You *may* have mis-imagined it. I don't have the power to convey to you the effect and geometry of the images that depict our world from below low orbit. It's...
Zh: “你*也许*想错了。我没有能力向你传达图像的效果和几何结构，从低轨道描绘我们的世界。它是……”

En: That's looking less and less likely, detective. You wouldn't know it from the tabloids, but the ORG nations have been launching weather balloons into the lower ionosphere since the Thirties.
Zh: “这种可能性似乎显得越来越小了。从小报上不会了解到的，不过ORG国家自从30年代起，一直在向低电离层发射气象气球。”

En: What is *Hell?*
Zh: “*地狱*是什么？”

En: Inside sideways? What *shape* is this world then?
Zh: “间接从内部观察？那这个世界是什么*形状*的？”

En: Yes. She pauses. "Pale covers 72% of the surface. There are grey flares and prominences, even arcs above entire isolas... The images are blurry, but if there was a sphere in there it certainly looks like it fractured a long time ago."
Zh: “是的。”她停顿了一下。“灰域覆盖了表面大约72%的面积。它们是灰色的耀斑和日珥，甚至是整个洲上的弧线……图像是模糊的，不过如果里面有一个球体的话，看起来肯定是很久以前就断裂了的样子。”

En: Okay. And then everything will be okay?
Zh: “好吧。然后一切都会好起来吗？”

En: Oh my god, wait -- what the hell are you telling me?
Zh: “我的天啦，等等——你到底想告诉我什么？”

En: But you already have, she looks around. "And you're doing just fine, despite the rubble."
Zh: “不过你已经身处其中了，”她看看周围。“尽管有些嗑嗑绊绊，你还是做得很好啊。”

En: What do you mean *corona*?
Zh: “你说的*星冕*是什么意思？”

En: The pale...? And what do you mean *corona*?
Zh: “灰域……？还有你说的*星冕*是什么意思？”

En: You seem to be spooked. Please don't be. Her voice becomes homely, calm. She lets a moment pass.
Zh: “你好像被吓到了。不用这样。”她的语气变得平常而镇定，让这一刻静静过去。

En: A fractured corona doesn't feel like it's gonna bring anyone *together*.
Zh: “一个断裂的星冕感觉不会让任何人联合在*一起*。”

En: There's a steadily increasing trickle of images. Between the big three they're piecing together a dark grey corona.
Zh: “星球的图像正在慢慢稳定地增加。在三大家之间，他们拼凑出一个深灰色的星冕。”

En: There's a steadily increasing trickle of images. Between the big three scientific contributors, they're piecing together a dark grey corona.
Zh: “图像正在慢慢稳定地增加。在三个为科研作出贡献的大国之间，他们拼凑出一个深灰色的星冕。”

En: Splat-splat! From a dilapidated balcony, Cindy the SKULL gives Joyce the evil eye, her red paintbrush held to her throat...
Zh: “啪嗒-啪嗒！”在一个摇摇欲坠的阳台上，骷髅头辛迪恶狠狠地瞪着乔伊斯，手中的红色漆刷紧握在喉咙旁边……

En: Splat-splat! From a dilapidated balcony, a young girl in odd clothes gives Joyce the evil eye, a red paintbrush held to her throat...
Zh: “啪嗒-啪嗒！”在一个摇摇欲坠的阳台上，一个衣着古怪的年轻女孩正恶狠狠地瞪着乔伊斯，手中的红色漆刷紧握在喉咙旁边……

En: You could be wrong -- but from here it appears as if she's running the brush *across* her throat, in a sawing motion.
Zh: 你可能是弄错了——不过从这里看来，就好像她做了一个锯开的动作，用漆刷*划破*了她的喉咙。

En: This *place* is an unmarked microsettlement on the coast of Martinaise... She gestures toward a collection of cinderblock dwellings covered by a highly carcinogenic roofing material.
Zh: “这个*地方*是马丁内斯海岸上没有标记出来的一个小定居点……”她朝着被高度致癌屋顶材料覆盖的一堆煤渣砖住宅笔了个手势。

En: It's lovely, really. I'm thinking of buying it.
Zh: “它很可爱，真的。我在考虑把它买下来。”

En: Really?
Zh: “真的吗？”

En: Yes -- so I can spite Evrart and spoil his plans for this place. I'm a petty person, I admit.
Zh: “是的——这样我就能惹怒艾弗拉特，破坏他在这里的计划。我承认，我是个很小气的人。”

En: Actually, yes. The thought did cross my mind when Mademoiselle Lilienne over there told me about the fresh produce these women sell to restaurants on the Delta.
Zh: “事实上，有的。当那边的莉莉恩小姐告诉我这些女人把新鲜农产品卖给德尔塔的餐馆之后，我的脑子里确实出现过这种想法。”

En: Don't worry, I'll never get around to it -- the information you pass to me will remain confidential, She waves you off: "Let's get back to reality, shall we?"
Zh: “别担心，我永远抽不出来这种时间的——你传递给我的信息，我会保密的，”她朝你挥挥手：“我们还是说回现实吧，怎么样？”

En: You both turn to consider the young woman. She's hunched over a net, methodically picking out ribbons of plastic...
Zh: 你们俩都转而考虑起这个年轻女人来。她正弯腰站在一张网的前面，有条不紊地挑拣着塑料带……

En: This place could use a competent manager. There's so much to be done. But then, I'll never get around to it, will I?
Zh: “这个地方需要一个能干的管理者。还有很多要做的事情。不过，我永远也抽不出这种时间来的，不是吗？”

En: There is regret in her voice -- for all the countless things she never had time to do with her money.
Zh: 她的声音里透露出几分悔意——因为所有这些数也数不清的事情，她永远都没时间处理自己的钱。

En: Doubtless I'll be off some place, keeping social classes from each other's throats... There's a pause. "Let's go back to the basics of reality, shall we?"
Zh: “毫无疑问，我还会去别的什么地方，不让各个社会阶层互相残杀……”她停顿了一下。“我们还是说回现实吧，怎么样？”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: Great bodies of water, forest-covered surfaces... clusters of light where the cities lie. You've seen the montage, we all have -- this world is enough, she concludes.
Zh: “大片的水域，森林覆盖的表面……城市所在地那密集的灯光。你见过那些画面，我们都看过——这个世界已经足够了，”她总结到。

En: The camera of her mind glides over the surface of the water.
Zh: 她脑子里的照相机在水面滑翔而过。

En: What do you see?
Zh: “你看见什么？”

En: Of bodies of water and forest-covered surfaces, clusters of light where the cities lie. You've seen the montage, we all have -- this world is enough, she concludes.
Zh: “大片的水域，森林覆盖的表面……城市所在地那密集的灯光。你见过那些画面，我们都看过——这个世界已经足够了，”她总结到。

En: It *must* be. This is the greatest and kindest arrangement the atoms had in them.
Zh: *肯定*就是这样。这是原子最伟大、也是最仁慈的安排。

En: A frisson lifts the hair on the back of your arm. Wind sweeps the surface of the bay.
Zh: 一阵颤栗让你手臂背面的毛发直立。海风吹拂过海湾的表面。

En: THE WORLD IS A SUZERAINTY
Zh: 这个世界是一个宗主国

En: The wind is sweeping the waters...
Zh: “风吹拂过水面……”

En: The best of all possible worlds.
Zh: “所有可能的世界中最棒的那个。”

En: Say nothing.
Zh: 什么也不说。

En: I've got a clear picture. Let's proceed to another term.
Zh: “我脑子里有一个清晰的画面了。我们继续下一个话题吧。”

En: Let's. I am, after all, bourgeois and female -- hardly the perfect ambassador for the world.
Zh: “好的。毕竟，我是个资产阶级，还是个女性——算不上是这个世界最完美的使节。”

En: Oh, you want a *picture* of the world? She raises her finger to her lips. "There is no complete set yet, dear. They're having some trouble reaching orbit."
Zh: “哦，你想要这个世界的一张*相片*？”她把手指举到唇边。“暂时还没有完整的相片呢，亲爱的。他们在进入轨道这方面遇到了一些麻烦。”

En: How come?
Zh: “为什么？”

En: Great things are difficult to achieve. For now, we're viewing the world from the inside -- sideways.
Zh: “伟大的事情是很难实现的。到目前为止，我们都是在内部观察这个世界——间接的。”

En: A cold fear seeps into you.
Zh: 一阵冰冷的恐惧感朝你袭来。

En: I am sorry, detective, she looks around. "Philosophically speaking -- it must sound *quite terrifying*. Even scientific positivism isn't entirely convinced about what we're dealing with here..."
Zh: “很抱歉，警探，”她环顾四周。“从哲学的意义上讲——听起来肯定*特别吓人*。就连科学实证主义都不能完全确信我们面对的东西……”

En: She looks up: "It's like the crowning of the world. It's insane. Very *disco*. You'd love it."
Zh: 她抬头仰望：“就好像是给这个世界戴上了一顶王冠。很疯狂。很*迪斯科*。你会喜欢的。”

En: I don't care about disco, I only care about the Commune.
Zh: “我不在乎迪斯科，我只在乎公社。”

En: See? Everyone finds something worth holding onto in the world -- however wasted its opportunities.
Zh: “看见没？在这个世界上，每个人都能找到某种值得紧紧把握的东西——不管到底浪费了多少机遇。”

En: She does not seem convinced that you'll be fine. If anything, she is realizing how deep your condition runs.
Zh: 她似乎不相信你会没事。如果有什么的话，她正慢慢意识到你的状况到底有多严重。

En: She does not seem convinced that you'll be fine. If anything, she is realizing this whole reality low-down is less *philosophical* than you've led on.
Zh: 她似乎不相信你会没事。如果有什么的话，她正慢慢意识到这整个现实内幕并没有你说的那么*哲学*。

En: Okay, forget all this stuff. Let me ask something else.
Zh: “好吧，忘了这些事吧。我想问点别的。

En: Yes! She claps her hands for warmth.
Zh: “好的！”她摩擦双手，想要取暖。

En: The cold seeps into you. The air is heavy with 80% humidity.
Zh: 寒冷渗入你的发肤。空气湿度高达80%。

En: Suddenly you're conscious of yourself standing there, on... whatever this all is. Your arms hang down by your sides.
Zh: 突然间，你强烈地意识到自己正站在那里，在……不管是什么的上面。你的双臂低垂在身体两侧。

En: The lieutenant observes you both, silently. He adjusts his glasses.
Zh: 警督沉默地观察着你们，调整了一下鼻梁上的眼镜。

En: The pale is not, technically speaking, part of *reality*...
Zh: “从严格意义上讲，灰域，不是*现实*的一部分……”

En: Yes, the lieutenant looks at his watch. "Also, I think we've had enough excitement for today. Remember -- we have a cadaver to attend to."
Zh: “是的，”警督看了看表。“还有，我觉得今天受到的刺激已经差不多了。记住了——我们还有具尸体要调查呢。”

En: Yes, the lieutenant looks at his watch. "Also, I think we've had enough excitement for today. We *do* have a case to attend to."
Zh: “是的，”警督看了看表。“还有，我觉得今天受到的刺激已经差不多了。我们*的确*还有个案子要查呢。”

En: Ma'am. He turns to her again. "Remember, you're dealing with a very *sensitive* and *impressionable* police officer who is still recovering from a recent medical episode."
Zh: “夫人，”他再次转向她，“请记住，你面对的是一个非常*敏感*和*容易被影响*的警官，他正从最近遭遇的医疗插曲中恢复呢。”

En: His voice is low, but firm. All she can say is...
Zh: 他的声音很低，不过十分坚定。她只能说……

En: Of course, lieutenant, she bows, then turns to you. "Let's try something else."
Zh: “当然了，警督，”她鞠了一躬，然后转向你。“我们试试别的吧。”

En: We've been through this -- ask something else or let's return to work.
Zh: “我们已经谈过了——问点别的，不然我们就回去工作。”

En: I don't want to. I want to know what the pale is.
Zh: “我不要。我想知道灰域是什么。”

En: Okay then.
Zh: “那好吧。”

En: The lieutenant glances at you from the corner of his eye.
Zh: 金用眼角的余光瞥了你一眼。

En: Was he just... worried? That you would find out something awful?
Zh: 他刚才是不是……有些担心？担心你会发现一些可怕的事情？

En: What do you mean it's not part of *reality*?
Zh: ”你说它不是*现实*的一部分是什么意思？”

En: I don't think your colleague would appreciate that -- he has already been so patient with this whole... exercise.
Zh: “我觉得你的同事不会喜欢那个的——他已经对这整个……练习……感到不耐烦了。”

En: Let's continue with something else, alright? She leans against the railing: "You can ask about *anything* else in the world. Anything."
Zh: “我们继续说点别的吧，好吗？”她靠在栏杆上：“你可以问我这个世界上*任何*其他的事情。什么都行。”

En: The lieutenant's right, let's change topics? She gives you a little wink: "What do you want to know? Anything!"
Zh: “警督说得对，我们换个话题吧？”她朝你使了个眼色：“你想知道什么？任何事情都可以！”

En: You could sneak back -- later, when he's *not* around... unless you can convince him to step aside?
Zh: 你应该偷偷溜回来——稍晚一些，当他*不在*的时候……除非，你可以说服他回避？

En: But... she wants to tell you.
Zh: 但是……她想告诉你。

En: You could sneak back, later, when the lieutenant is *not* here... unless you can convince him to step aside?
Zh: 你应该之后再偷偷溜回来，等警督*不在*这里的时候……除非你能说服他回避？

En: He truly, truly doesn't want you to know.
Zh: 他是真的，真的不想让你知道。

En: What is it, what is it, what is it? You can *feel* it -- something pushing against the other side of a locked door. You *must* find the key!
Zh: 这是什么，这是什么，这是什么？你能*感觉*到——有什么东西正在一扇上锁的门背后推撞。你*必须*找到钥匙！

En: Go ahead, officer -- ask me something *else*. The woman looks at you attentively.
Zh: “来吧，警官——问我点*别的*事。”女人聚精会神地看着你。

En: Are you sure you're sure? Your colleague seemed adamant...
Zh: “你真的确定吗？你的同事好像很固执……”

En: It is the opposite of reality.
Zh: “它是现实的反面。”

En: Yes -- what is the pale?
Zh: “是的——什么是灰域？”

En: Okay, another term then.
Zh: “好吧，那就换个话题。”

En: Of course -- ask away. She seems slightly relieved.
Zh: “当然了——随便问吧。”她似乎放松了一点。

En: Okay. She concedes. "The pale is the most dominant geological feature of the world, detective -- the separative tissue between the isolas. It is the interisolary mass."
Zh: “好吧。”她让步了。“灰域是世界上最显性的地理特征，警探——它是洲之间的分离薄纱。它是跨洲的聚集体。”

En: Wait, and what is an isola?
Zh: “等等，洲是什么？”

En: Okay... what is the pale *like*?
Zh: “好吧……那这个灰域是*什么样*的？”

En: *Isola* is a Messinian word for a continent of matter, enveloped on all sides by the pale. Also: isolation, or land mass. We used to believe there was only one. In the last four centuries we have discovered seven...
Zh: “*洲*是一个梅西纳词语，意思是物质的大陆，四周都被灰域包围。还可以叫做：隔离带，或者大陆块。以前我们相信只有一个洲。在过去的四个世纪里，我们发现了七座……”

En: Mundi, Seol, Samara, Iilmaraa, Graad, Katla, and this -- Insulinde.
Zh: “蒙迪，西奥，萨马拉，伊尔玛，格拉德，卡特拉，还有这个——伊苏林迪。”

En: And Insulinde is...?
Zh: “那伊苏林迪是……”

En: An oceanic isola. It comprises mostly of water. Mundi is the largest, Katla the coldest, Insulinde the bluest. What can I say... She stops. "Each is perishing and dear."
Zh: “一座海洋洲。主要是由水组成的。蒙迪是最大的，卡特拉是最冷的，伊苏林迪是最蓝的。我能说什么呢……”她停了下来。“每一个都是即讨厌又可爱。”

En: The water, the light... It's as though you're seeing it for the *first* time.
Zh: 水，光……仿佛你是*第一次*看见一样……

En: A sparkle of lights on the night-time horizon, reflected in the dark sea.
Zh: 夜晚地平线上闪耀的灯光，倒映在黑暗的海面上。

En: Twenty-two kilometres from the centre of the world. That soldering iron is the Bank of the World building. The bottom floors are INSURCOM -- *Coalition Government* Insulindian Mission Command.
Zh: “距离世界中心22公里。那块烙铁就是世界银行大楼。底层是INSURCOM——*联盟政府*伊苏林迪任务指挥中心。”

En: A sparkle of lights on the horizon, like evening stars above the curvature of the planet.
Zh: 地平线上闪烁的灯光，就像星球弧线上方的晚星。

En: A sparkle of lights on the horizon, like morning stars above the curvature of the planet.
Zh: 地平线上闪烁的灯光，就像星球弧线上方的晨星。

En: A collection of tall ghosts behind the water vapour, light reflecting off their glass windows.
Zh: 水汽背后伫立着一群高大的幽灵，灯光反射在它们的玻璃窗上。

En: Look to the sea...
Zh: 看着大海……

En: Silence. She lowers her hand.
Zh: 沉默无语。她放低了手。

En: There is no recognition. Only the immensity of the sea, and the cold radiating from it.
Zh: 没有赞誉。只有浩瀚无垠的大海，还有它辐射出的寒意。

En: Where *are* we?
Zh: “我们*在哪*？”

En: I don't know any of this...
Zh: “这些我都不知道……”

En: Say nothing. Observe the large body of water swelling. Cold...
Zh: 什么也不说。观察着浩瀚无垠的水面。寒冷……

En: She observes your eyes scanning the horizon, then breaks the silence, slowly.
Zh: 她注意到你的眼睛扫视着地平线，然后慢慢打破了沉默。

En: Was there something else you wanted to know? I remember something about a low-down...
Zh: “你还有什么想知道的吗？我记得你说了什么内幕……”

En: Your stomach grumbles approvingly... the reality rhizome is opening up before your very eyes.
Zh: 你的肚子赞同地咕咕叫着……现实的根茎在你眼前展开。

En: She stares at you, head tilted to the side, with a slightly concerned look on her face.
Zh: 她盯着你，头歪向一边，脸上的表情略显担忧。

En: Are they now? The lieutenant cocks one eyebrow.
Zh: “是吗？”警督扬起一边的眉毛。

En: I hope we are able to continue as friends, despite my deeply felt need to infiltrate and betray the Revolution. And then ensnare you to financial *seruice*.
Zh: “尽管我深刻地感觉到需要渗透和背叛大革命，希望我们还能继续维持朋友关系。然后诱使你为金融*服务*。”

En: I hope we are able to remain friends despite my scaly bulk and my love of regicide and homo-sexuality. The loss of sovereignty was not our plan all along, I assure you.
Zh: “尽管我劣迹斑斑，还有我对弑君和同性恋的喜爱，希望我们可以维持朋友关系。我可以向你保证，失去主权从来都不是我们的计划。”

En: "I hope we are able to continue as friends despite my scaly bulk. And my intimidating liberal credentials. This was not the plan all along."
Zh: “尽管我劣迹斑斑，希望我们可以维持朋友关系。还有我那令人不安的自由主义凭证。计划本来并不是这个样子的。”

En: I hope so. I hope we are able to continue as friends despite my scaly bulk. And the insanity, bloodshed, and transfer of wealth that took place here. It was not *the plan all along*.
Zh: “希望如此。尽管我劣迹斑斑，希望我们可以维持朋友关系。还有这里发生的一切疯狂，杀戮和财产转移事件。*计划自始自终*都不是这样的。”

En: I hope we are able to continue as friends despite my scaly bulk. And the treacheries committed by my people against the Suzerain and the Commune.
Zh: “尽管我劣迹斑斑，希望我们可以维持朋友关系。还有我背叛宗主国和大革命的行为。”

En: Am I really that awkward?
Zh: “我真有那么笨拙吗？”

En: Are you saying I'm ruined?
Zh: “你是说我被毁了？”

En: She pauses to take a long, leisurely sip of tea. "Alright, what next?"
Zh: 她停下来，慢慢地、悠然自得地喝了一大口茶水。“好吧，接下来是什么？”

En: I don't know, I just feel it.
Zh: “我不知道，我只是感觉到了。”

En: What's so funny about that?
Zh: “那有什么好笑的？”

En: Nothing, nothing, it's just... She wipes a tear from her eye. "True, that's all. The uniforms, the language... Let's have another question about reality, shall we?"
Zh: “没什么，没什么，只是……”她擦掉眼角的一滴泪。“真的，就这些。制服，语言……我们再说个关于现实的问题吧，好吗？”

En: Ah, yes. That is what counts, I suppose. For my part, I was more of a *New* girl.
Zh: “啊，是的。我想这才是最重要的。对于我来说，我更像是一个*新时代*女性。”

En: Okay, but... what *is* it? A definition...
Zh: “好吧，不过……那*是*什么？一个定义……”

En: So I'm basically a lackey of capital?
Zh: “所以我基本上就是资本的狗腿子了？”

En: So I'm basically a thrall to foreign interests?
Zh: “所以我基本上就是外国利益的奴隶了？”
